If you could experience any wild animal’s perspective for a day, which animal would you pick, and why?
Squirrel. It would be like watching the world's craziest GoPro live feed. Would also be neat to know whether they're literally messing with everyone or if they're just that aloof.
Probably from an otter's perspective, they kinda act like cats
Either a eagle somewhere in the mountains or one of those mountain goats that climb on the side of mountains that would be terrifying but amazing
Dolphin. They seem happy? Always in groups, swimming and jumping. Free
A sloth, I want to rest
Giraffe. Seems like it would be neat to be so high up all the time.
Bengal Tiger, I was always a big far of tigers…and it would be amazing to experience stalking and tracking from their perspective
koala because i wanna sleep for 80% of the day
Giraffe maybe because I think it would be fun to feel very tall.
A spider. It HAS to be vibes. Just chilling. Human notices you, hide. Vibe.
The arctic tern - its migration route is from the arctic to the antarctic every year. You could see everything - the entire world. They fly 44,000 miles. You'd be able to see everything!
dolphin, because they are smartest animal in the world, and i'm wonder if there any dolphin mafia and antlantida in the world

Giraffe would be cool. I know they are super tall and tend to live on plains, but no idea what their eyesight is like... Maybe they can see everything for miles and maybe it's all a blur beyond a few metres. Either way, let's find out!
Cats, and just sleep on a couch
An Albatross to soar the breeze on endless oceans
Eagle. Be cool to see everything while flying above it all
Mantis Shrimp. I wanna see all the pretty colors and throw punches that make water boil.
Some bird, probably hawk - I like seeing world from the height - it shows how small we're and how much we haven't experienced in our life 🙃
jellyfish, they just chill all day every day i imagine i will end that day rested and rejuvenated

I would want to be a bird, something like a falcon or an eagle that can soar really high. I bet it's an amazing feeling to be that high up in the air just from having your wings out and floating up from the heat currents!
